dofs

class vmol.tools.dofs.VisualAngle(a: list, b: list, n: int, origin: list | None = None, scene: canvas | None = None, color: list | None = None, factor: float = 1)[source]

New vpython object created out of triangles (semicircle). This allows to change the magnitude, orientation and position of the angle even after created.

hide()[source]

hide the angle

Return type:

(VisualAngle) hiden angle.

show()[source]

shows the angle in the scene.

Return type:

(VisualAngle) showed anfle.

transport(v0: list) → list[source]

translate the angle as a rigid body :param v0: vector that to translate the arc. :type v0: list

Return type:

(list) list of updated vertexes.

update_vertexes(origin: list | None = None, a: list | None = None, b: list | None = None, color: list | None = None) → list[source]

Up-to-dates color, origin or the position of the intermedia arc-points based in new side vectors.

Parameters:

  • origin – position of the vertex of the arc.

  • a (list) – vector side of the angle.

  • b (list) – vector side of the angle.

  • color (list) – RGB color of the arc.

Return type:

(list) list of updated vertexes.
